TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pa-na-ma Ś∑īśčŅť¶¨ == sakasingangan nu kanatalŚúčŚźćÁĒĪšĺÜ caylimcaylu mihcaan, Ke-lun-pu a ziwsiw makatukuh i niyadu' nu mibutingay " aydaay a tukay nu Pa-na-ma", pasumaden han tu "Pa-na-ma". itini i nakamuan nu Si-pan-ya, imin nina "Pa-na-ma" u "babutingan nu niyadu'", "maluyaluya nu babutingan". caylimcaysiw mihcaan, ya babutingan a niyadu'an malatatengaay tu a ngangan tu " Pa-na-ma-cen", sa ya niyadu' nikudan satu ya niyadu' hamin han a pangangan tu "Pa-na-ma". caywallusep mihcaan, ina Ta-ke-lun-pi-ya-kun-he-kuo masasula'cu malaliyad, ina Pa-na-ma mala Ke-lun-pi-ya-kun-he-kuo a zing. idaw ku sakalepacawan a kakitidaan, i caysiw a se-ci malingatu idaw ku midadasay tu Pa-na-ma sauwac nu nisimsiman, nika mapahiya nu kitidaan nanay a kakapah nu liklikan atu gigicu nu kalisiwan nikautiihay sa caay pikeda a sikawaw. 1830ŚĻī, . caywalsipsep mihcaan naw Muo-si-ke a Cia-li-hu-ni-ya makaadih tu kim nu nikudan, Ke-lun-pi-ya itida i nutawan a kanatalan mikabu atu gigicu patideng tu Pa-na-ma-tay-ping-yang nu silamalay a dadan, paka'dem tu mikimay a tademaw taydan i Cia-cuo a miyukiw tu sapiliwku. tawya Pei-mem-ta-lu a dadan ma'put nu sakatayda a dadanan, sisa makayda i bayuan pasayda i Pa-na-ma amis a Ke-lun mikacaw tu silamalay, mikacawac tu balungan pasayda i Cia-cuo a dadanan u sakizayay nu tuki atu kalisiw. imahini, malaTay-ping-yeng silamalay Ta-si-yeng midungdung tu sasaluemengan a Ke-lung alaw malaangangan nu tatelungan nu sasiwbayan. 1840 . caysiwpicpic mihcaan siwa a bulad pitu a demiad, ci Ci-mi.Ka-te' a Amilika sihu atu Tuo-li-huo-se a Pa-na-ma sihu makakiyaku tu sakay Pa-na-ma-sauwac nu baluhay a kiyakuan. idaw ku nipatucuk tu baluhay a kiyakuan, Amilika itini i caysiwsiwsiw sadikuday nu mihcaan nu ayawan hamin han nu heni ku sapikuwan tu sauwacan sauwac atu sapikuwanan tu niyadu'an haymaw sa panukas tu Pa-na-ma-kun-he-kuo sihu, i Pa-na-ma sauwac nu Amilika a hitay mamin a miliyas. 1977ŚĻī9śúą7śó•, . ci Tuo-li-huo-se mapatay satu, ci Man-niw.Nuo-zuy-ciw itida i caysiwwallu mihcaan maala mikawaw nu tapang. nikalatapangan, ci Nuo-zuy-ciw kilulen nida ku kawaw nu ayaway, mangalay misaales tu Amilika a nikalawlawan. pasayda mikapi tu Su-lan, micaliw tu mihantayay a binacadan misaicelang tu udip a kinli atu udip tu, hinawawies tu mihantayay atu mihantayay a tan. mahiniay a kawaw malinges ku Amilika sisa malingatu patideng tu sapihantayay a tan. taya, kitidaan nu Pa-na-ma u sakapahay a kakitidaan, malaKe-lun-pi-ya nu pacakayay tu dukuay nu papaliwalan tu pasayda i pei-mem kasaupuan a pacakay tu duku atu sapipinkuay tu kalisiw a angangan, ci Nuo-zuy-cia kaisa mihang tu Amilika a sapacakay tu dukuan atu sabalihbih tu Amilika sisa linges sa ku Aamilika pabalucu' milawpes . 118 caysepsepsep mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad tulu a bataan idaw ku cacay a demiad, Pa-na-ma patalumaen nu heni ku Pa-na-ma sawac a hamin nu kakuwanan atu hun-u' a kinlian, hitay nu Amilika mamin a pacubelisen. nika piliyasan nu Amilika a hitay u Ke-lung taneng atu Pa-na-ma malalitin malecabay heni, hedeken tu ku micapiay tu cacay a lasubuan nu mihcaan a likisian. 61 tucay nikuda nu se-cian, kapah tu ku sakaudip nu Pa-na-ma, lihalay atu makaykic tu ku nipikuwanan sisa u Pa-na-ma taneng milabu tu kanatal a nikapapadangan, macunus nu Amilika tu sakala aidangan atu mituysiway a papilian nu tataydaan, Pa-na-ma yadah tu ku helupan tu nutaw a kanatalan tu kalisiw, dadawa mapalekal. nika i tusepcaylim mihcaan u Wi-nei-zuy-la mahetik ku sakaudip nuheni, Pa-na-ma mala Na-mem-cuo tataydaan nu pacebasananay a mihineng pasayda i Amilika a angangan nu tataydaan, ayda nu mihcaan u Pa-si-wi-nay-zuy-la-mi-lu a laylay nu tataydaan nu mabulaway a kitidaan, Cun-kuo, Ya-cuo kanatal miubiay atayda nu tademawan malingatu katuud ku tayda i Pa-na-ma " dadan nu heni", midebungay nu tademaw yadah tu ku sicumiay a kawaw mabiyalaw tu kina kanatal. 21šłĖÁīÄŚĺĆ, . kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ Pa-na-ma itida i Cung-mem-cuo, amisa u Cia-le-pi-bayu, tumula u Tay-pin-yung, nutipan mitulin tu Ke-se-ta-li-cia, walian mitulin tu Ke-lun-pi-ya. u mitulinay tu Pei-mem-cuo atu Na-mem-cuo a lalaan. i labu nu aadupan yadah ku mahicaay nu aadupan hatiniay tu nu Cun-mem-cuo kanatalan u satalakaway, kahinian yadah i Pei-mem-cuo atu Na-mem-cuo a aadupan nu cancanan a angangan. ilabu idaw ku Pa-na-ma sauwacan. Pa-na-ma u kapulungan nu kanatal, masakaputay nu sasiwbayan, kanatul nu kalisiw nu masakaputay, kitakid kapulungan a gingku, masakaputay nu kitakid a sakay kapah nu udipan, piktu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu kapulungan a kanatalan, kaisa sicabay a laylay, La-men atu Cia-le-pi pulung nu kanatal, Mem-cuo kanatal masakaputay, La-mem sakaudipan, Cung-mem-cuo masacacayay nu angnganan a kanatal atu niyadu'ay a tademawan nu kanatalan, Cung-mem-cuo kapulungan nu iciba a malaheciay nu tademaw a kanatal, u La-tin-mem-cuo "Tay-pin-yung-lin-mum" a sasingkiwan nu kanatalan atu miawasay tu Tay-pin-yung sakalepacaw nu sakaudip a kangki nu midiputay "TPP". tusepcaypic mihcaan enem a bulad sabaw tulu a demiad, Pa-na-ma-kun-he-kuo sihu patungih patideng atu Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo a tatengaay a malecabay sa, mahedek atu Cung-hua-min-kuo nu tenes caysepnem mihcaan ku nikalecabayan. sakamusa " nu cacayay a Cung-kuo nisulitan, hatida tu atu Taywan tu nikalecabayan sa". amica ku nikakapah nu kakitidaan nu Pa-na-ma u angangangan u sapidiputaw tu katuuday ku kawaw, u gingku, sasiwbayan, laliwkuan ku angangangan. Pa-na-ma a nipatideng atu sasiwbayan atu Amilika idaw ku ba'ketay nu kankian, Pa-na-ma namaka caysiwseppic malingatu u Amilika nu kalisiw ku sapisusi nu sasiwbayan, nu udip tu a kalisiw han u pa-pu-ye, nipatahekalan han cay a hun, cacay a bataan a hun, tulim a hun, limsep a hun atu cacay a kalisiwan a kakalisiwan, atu nu Amilika u malecaday itini sa i nu udiptu a kanatalan micukaymas. i kitakiday nu sayaway Amilika sakay hekal micukaymas tu Amilika a kalisiwan u nipatucekan a kalisiw nu kanatalan. .
S.PHON: == pa-na-ma *** == sakasiŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ**** ¶ajr~…ĺim ¶ajr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, k…ô-r~…ĺun-pu a ziwsiw makatukuńß i nijadu Ē~ ° nu mibutiŇčaj " ajdaaj a tukaj nu pa-na-ma", pasumad…ôn ńßan tu "pa-na-ma". itini i nakamuan nu si-pan-ja, imin nina "pa-na-ma" u "babutiŇčan nu nijadu Ē~ °", "mar~…ĺujar~…ĺuja nu babutiŇčan". ¶ajr~…ĺim ¶ajsiw mińß ¶aan, ja babutiŇčan a nijadu Ē~ °an mar~…ĺatat…ôŇčaaj tu a ŇčaŇčan tu " pa-na-ma- ¶…ôn", sa ja nijadu Ē~ ° nikudan satu ja nijadu Ē~ ° ńßamin ńßan a paŇčaŇčan tu "pa-na-ma". ¶ajwar~…ĺr~…ĺus…ôp mińß ¶aan, ina ta-k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja-kun-ńß…ô-kuo masasur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶u mar~…ĺar~…ĺijad, ina pa-na-ma mar~…ĺa k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a ziŇč. idaw ku sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a kakitidaan, i ¶ajsiw a s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu idaw ku midadasaj tu pa-na-ma sauwa ¶ nu nisimsiman, nika mapańßija nu kitidaan nanaj a kakapańß nu r~…ĺikr~…ĺikan atu gigi ¶u nu kar~…ĺisiwan nikautiińßaj sa ¶aaj pik…ôda a sikawaw. *****, . ¶ajwar~…ĺsips…ôp mińß ¶aan naw muo-si-k…ô a ¶ia-r~…ĺi-ńßu-ni-ja makaadińß tu kim nu nikudan, k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja itida i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺan mikabu atu gigi ¶u patid…ôŇč tu pa-na-ma-taj-piŇč-jaŇč nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a dadan, paka Ē~ °d…ôm tu mikimaj a tad…ômaw tajdan i ¶ia- ¶uo a mijukiw tu sapir~…ĺiwku. tawja p…ôi-m…ôm-ta-r~…ĺu a dadan ma Ē~ °put nu sakatajda a dadanan, sisa makajda i bajuan pasajda i pa-na-ma amis a k…ô-r~…ĺun mika ¶aw tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, mika ¶awa ¶ tu bar~…ĺuŇčan pasajda i ¶ia- ¶uo a dadanan u sakizajaj nu tuki atu kar~…ĺisiw. imańßini, mar~…ĺataj-piŇč-j…ôŇč sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ta-si-j…ôŇč miduŇčduŇč tu sasar~…ĺu…ôm…ôŇčan a k…ô-r~…ĺuŇč ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺaaŇčaŇčan nu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu sasiwbajan. **** . ¶ajsiwpi ¶pi ¶ mińß ¶aan siwa a bur~…ĺad pitu a d…ômiad, ¶i ¶i-mi.ka-t…ô Ē~ ° a amir~…ĺika sińßu atu tuo-r~…ĺi-ńßuo-s…ô a pa-na-ma sińßu makakijaku tu sakaj pa-na-ma-sauwa ¶ nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a kijakuan. idaw ku nipatu ¶uk tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a kijakuan, amir~…ĺika itini i ¶ajsiwsiwsiw sadikudaj nu mińß ¶aan nu ajawan ńßamin ńßan nu ńß…ôni ku sapikuwan tu sauwa ¶an sauwa ¶ atu sapikuwanan tu nijadu Ē~ °an ńßajmaw sa panukas tu pa-na-ma-kun-ńß…ô-kuo sińßu, i pa-na-ma sauwa ¶ nu amir~…ĺika a ńßitaj mamin a mir~…ĺijas. *********, . ¶i tuo-r~…ĺi-ńßuo-s…ô mapataj satu, ¶i man-niw.nuo-zuj- ¶iw itida i ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan maar~…ĺa mikawaw nu tapaŇč. nikar~…ĺatapaŇčan, ¶i nuo-zuj- ¶iw kir~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ku kawaw nu ajawaj, maŇčar~…ĺaj misaar~…ĺ…ôs tu amir~…ĺika a nikar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan. pasajda mikapi tu su-r~…ĺan, mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu mińßantajaj a bina ¶adan misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu udip a kinr~…ĺi atu udip tu, ńßinawawi…ôs tu mińßantajaj atu mińßantajaj a tan. mańßiniaj a kawaw mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ku amir~…ĺika sisa mar~…ĺiŇčatu patid…ôŇč tu sapińßantajaj a tan. taja, kitidaan nu pa-na-ma u sakapańßaj a kakitidaan, mar~…ĺak…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja nu pa ¶akajaj tu dukuaj nu papar~…ĺiwar~…ĺan tu pasajda i p…ôi-m…ôm kasaupuan a pa ¶akaj tu duku atu sapipinkuaj tu kar~…ĺisiw a aŇčaŇčan, ¶i nuo-zuj- ¶ia kaisa mińßaŇč tu amir~…ĺika a sapa ¶akaj tu dukuan atu sabar~…ĺińßbińß tu amir~…ĺika sisa r~…ĺiŇč…ôs sa ku aamir~…ĺika pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mir~…ĺawp…ôs . *** ¶ajs…ôps…ôps…ôp mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, pa-na-ma patar~…ĺuma…ôn nu ńß…ôni ku pa-na-ma sawa ¶ a ńßamin nu kakuwanan atu ńßun-u Ē~ ° a kinr~…ĺian, ńßitaj nu amir~…ĺika mamin a pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis…ôn. nika pir~…ĺijasan nu amir~…ĺika a ńßitaj u k…ô-r~…ĺuŇč tan…ôŇč atu pa-na-ma mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin mar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj ńß…ôni, ńß…ôd…ôk…ôn tu ku mi ¶apiaj tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubuan nu mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺikisian. ** tu ¶aj nikuda nu s…ô- ¶ian, kapańß tu ku sakaudip nu pa-na-ma, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj atu makajki ¶ tu ku nipikuwanan sisa u pa-na-ma tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺabu tu kanatar~…ĺ a nikapapadaŇčan, ma ¶unus nu amir~…ĺika tu sakar~…ĺa aidaŇčan atu mitujsiwaj a papir~…ĺian nu tatajdaan, pa-na-ma jadańß tu ku ńß…ôr~…ĺupan tu nutaw a kanatar~…ĺan tu kar~…ĺisiw, dadawa mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. nika i tus…ôp ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan u wi-n…ôi-zuj-r~…ĺa mańß…ôtik ku sakaudip nuńß…ôni, pa-na-ma mar~…ĺa na-m…ôm- ¶uo tatajdaan nu pa ¶…ôbasananaj a mińßin…ôŇč pasajda i amir~…ĺika a aŇčaŇčan nu tatajdaan, ajda nu mińß ¶aan u pa-si-wi-naj-zuj-r~…ĺa-mi-r~…ĺu a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu tatajdaan nu mabur~…ĺawaj a kitidaan, ¶un-kuo, ja- ¶uo kanatar~…ĺ miubiaj atajda nu tad…ômawan mar~…ĺiŇčatu katuud ku tajda i pa-na-ma " dadan nu ńß…ôni", mid…ôbuŇčaj nu tad…ômaw jadańß tu ku si ¶umiaj a kawaw mabijar~…ĺaw tu kina kanatar~…ĺ. *****, . kitidaan ** pa-na-ma itida i ¶uŇč-m…ôm- ¶uo, amisa u ¶ia-r~…ĺ…ô-pi-baju, tumur~…ĺa u taj-pin-juŇč, nutipan mitur~…ĺin tu k…ô-s…ô-ta-r~…ĺi- ¶ia, war~…ĺian mitur~…ĺin tu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja. u mitur~…ĺinaj tu p…ôi-m…ôm- ¶uo atu na-m…ôm- ¶uo a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan. i r~…ĺabu nu aadupan jadańß ku mańßi ¶aaj nu aadupan ńßatiniaj tu nu ¶un-m…ôm- ¶uo kanatar~…ĺan u satar~…ĺakawaj, kańßinian jadańß i p…ôi-m…ôm- ¶uo atu na-m…ôm- ¶uo a aadupan nu ¶an ¶anan a aŇčaŇčan. ir~…ĺabu idaw ku pa-na-ma sauwa ¶an. pa-na-ma u kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ, masakaputaj nu sasiwbajan, kanatur~…ĺ nu kar~…ĺisiw nu masakaputaj, kitakid kapur~…ĺuŇčan a giŇčku, masakaputaj nu kitakid a sakaj kapańß nu udipan, piktu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺan, kaisa si ¶abaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, r~…ĺa-m…ôn atu ¶ia-r~…ĺ…ô-pi pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ, m…ôm- ¶uo kanatar~…ĺ masakaputaj, r~…ĺa-m…ôm sakaudipan, ¶uŇč-m…ôm- ¶uo masa ¶a ¶ajaj nu aŇčŇčanan a kanatar~…ĺ atu nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômawan nu kanatar~…ĺan, ¶uŇč-m…ôm- ¶uo kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu i ¶iba a mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj nu tad…ômaw a kanatar~…ĺ, u r~…ĺa-tin-m…ôm- ¶uo "taj-pin-juŇč-r~…ĺin-mum" a sasiŇčkiwan nu kanatar~…ĺan atu miawasaj tu taj-pin-juŇč sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nu sakaudip a kaŇčki nu midiputaj "tpp". tus…ôp ¶ajpi ¶ mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad sabaw tur~…ĺu a d…ômiad, pa-na-ma-kun-ńß…ô-kuo sińßu patuŇčińß patid…ôŇč atu ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a tat…ôŇčaaj a mar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj sa, mańß…ôd…ôk atu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo nu t…ôn…ôs ¶ajs…ôpn…ôm mińß ¶aan ku nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan. sakamusa " nu ¶a ¶ajaj a ¶uŇč-kuo nisur~…ĺitan, ńßatida tu atu tajwan tu nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan sa". ami ¶a ku nikakapańß nu kakitidaan nu pa-na-ma u aŇčaŇčaŇčan u sapidiputaw tu katuudaj ku kawaw, u giŇčku, sasiwbajan, r~…ĺar~…ĺiwkuan ku aŇčaŇčaŇčan. pa-na-ma a nipatid…ôŇč atu sasiwbajan atu amir~…ĺika idaw ku ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj nu kankian, pa-na-ma namaka ¶ajsiws…ôppi ¶ mar~…ĺiŇčatu u amir~…ĺika nu kar~…ĺisiw ku sapisusi nu sasiwbajan, nu udip tu a kar~…ĺisiw ńßan u pa-pu-j…ô, nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan ńßan ¶aj a ńßun, ¶a ¶aj a bataan a ńßun, tur~…ĺim a ńßun, r~…ĺims…ôp a ńßun atu ¶a ¶aj a kar~…ĺisiwan a kakar~…ĺisiwan, atu nu amir~…ĺika u mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj itini sa i nu udiptu a kanatar~…ĺan mi ¶ukajmas. i kitakidaj nu sajawaj amir~…ĺika sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mi ¶ukajmas tu amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiwan u nipatu ¶…ôkan a kar~…ĺisiw nu kanatar~…ĺan. .
S.FORM: == Pa-na-ma Ś∑īśčŅť¶¨ == sakasingangan nu kanatalŚúčŚźćÁĒĪšĺÜ caylimcaylu mihcaan, Ke-lun-pu a ziwsiw makatukuh i niyadu' nu mibutingay " aydaay a tukay nu Pa-na-ma", pasumaden han tu "Pa-na-ma". itini i nakamuan nu Si-pan-ya, imin nina "Pa-na-ma" u "babutingan nu niyadu'", "maluyaluya nu babutingan". caylimcaysiw mihcaan, ya babutingan a niyadu'an malatatengaay tu a ngangan tu " Pa-na-ma-cen", sa ya niyadu' nikudan satu ya niyadu' hamin han a pangangan tu "Pa-na-ma". caywallusep mihcaan, ina Ta-ke-lun-pi-ya-kun-he-kuo masasula'cu malaliyad, ina Pa-na-ma mala Ke-lun-pi-ya-kun-he-kuo a zing. idaw ku sakalepacawan a kakitidaan, i caysiw a se-ci malingatu idaw ku midadasay tu Pa-na-ma sauwac nu nisimsiman, nika mapahiya nu kitidaan nanay a kakapah nu liklikan atu gigicu nu kalisiwan nikautiihay sa caay pikeda a sikawaw. 1830ŚĻī, . caywalsipsep mihcaan naw Muo-si-ke a Cia-li-hu-ni-ya makaadih tu kim nu nikudan, Ke-lun-pi-ya itida i nutawan a kanatalan mikabu atu gigicu patideng tu Pa-na-ma-tay-ping-yang nu silamalay a dadan, paka'dem tu mikimay a tademaw taydan i Cia-cuo a miyukiw tu sapiliwku. tawya Pei-mem-ta-lu a dadan ma'put nu sakatayda a dadanan, sisa makayda i bayuan pasayda i Pa-na-ma amis a Ke-lun mikacaw tu silamalay, mikacawac tu balungan pasayda i Cia-cuo a dadanan u sakizayay nu tuki atu kalisiw. imahini, malaTay-ping-yeng silamalay Ta-si-yeng midungdung tu sasaluemengan a Ke-lung alaw malaangangan nu tatelungan nu sasiwbayan. 1840 . caysiwpicpic mihcaan siwa a bulad pitu a demiad, ci Ci-mi.Ka-te' a Amilika sihu atu Tuo-li-huo-se a Pa-na-ma sihu makakiyaku tu sakay Pa-na-ma-sauwac nu baluhay a kiyakuan. idaw ku nipatucuk tu baluhay a kiyakuan, Amilika itini i caysiwsiwsiw sadikuday nu mihcaan nu ayawan hamin han nu heni ku sapikuwan tu sauwacan sauwac atu sapikuwanan tu niyadu'an haymaw sa panukas tu Pa-na-ma-kun-he-kuo sihu, i Pa-na-ma sauwac nu Amilika a hitay mamin a miliyas. 1977ŚĻī9śúą7śó•, . ci Tuo-li-huo-se mapatay satu, ci Man-niw.Nuo-zuy-ciw itida i caysiwwallu mihcaan maala mikawaw nu tapang. nikalatapangan, ci Nuo-zuy-ciw kilulen nida ku kawaw nu ayaway, mangalay misaales tu Amilika a nikalawlawan. pasayda mikapi tu Su-lan, micaliw tu mihantayay a binacadan misaicelang tu udip a kinli atu udip tu, hinawawies tu mihantayay atu mihantayay a tan. mahiniay a kawaw malinges ku Amilika sisa malingatu patideng tu sapihantayay a tan. taya, kitidaan nu Pa-na-ma u sakapahay a kakitidaan, malaKe-lun-pi-ya nu pacakayay tu dukuay nu papaliwalan tu pasayda i pei-mem kasaupuan a pacakay tu duku atu sapipinkuay tu kalisiw a angangan, ci Nuo-zuy-cia kaisa mihang tu Amilika a sapacakay tu dukuan atu sabalihbih tu Amilika sisa linges sa ku Aamilika pabalucu' milawpes . 118 caysepsepsep mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad tulu a bataan idaw ku cacay a demiad, Pa-na-ma patalumaen nu heni ku Pa-na-ma sawac a hamin nu kakuwanan atu hun-u' a kinlian, hitay nu Amilika mamin a pacubelisen. nika piliyasan nu Amilika a hitay u Ke-lung taneng atu Pa-na-ma malalitin malecabay heni, hedeken tu ku micapiay tu cacay a lasubuan nu mihcaan a likisian. 61 tucay nikuda nu se-cian, kapah tu ku sakaudip nu Pa-na-ma, lihalay atu makaykic tu ku nipikuwanan sisa u Pa-na-ma taneng milabu tu kanatal a nikapapadangan, macunus nu Amilika tu sakala aidangan atu mituysiway a papilian nu tataydaan, Pa-na-ma yadah tu ku helupan tu nutaw a kanatalan tu kalisiw, dadawa mapalekal. nika i tusepcaylim mihcaan u Wi-nei-zuy-la mahetik ku sakaudip nuheni, Pa-na-ma mala Na-mem-cuo tataydaan nu pacebasananay a mihineng pasayda i Amilika a angangan nu tataydaan, ayda nu mihcaan u Pa-si-wi-nay-zuy-la-mi-lu a laylay nu tataydaan nu mabulaway a kitidaan, Cun-kuo, Ya-cuo kanatal miubiay atayda nu tademawan malingatu katuud ku tayda i Pa-na-ma " dadan nu heni", midebungay nu tademaw yadah tu ku sicumiay a kawaw mabiyalaw tu kina kanatal. 21šłĖÁīÄŚĺĆ, . kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ Pa-na-ma itida i Cung-mem-cuo, amisa u Cia-le-pi-bayu, tumula u Tay-pin-yung, nutipan mitulin tu Ke-se-ta-li-cia, walian mitulin tu Ke-lun-pi-ya. u mitulinay tu Pei-mem-cuo atu Na-mem-cuo a lalaan. i labu nu aadupan yadah ku mahicaay nu aadupan hatiniay tu nu Cun-mem-cuo kanatalan u satalakaway, kahinian yadah i Pei-mem-cuo atu Na-mem-cuo a aadupan nu cancanan a angangan. ilabu idaw ku Pa-na-ma sauwacan. Pa-na-ma u kapulungan nu kanatal, masakaputay nu sasiwbayan, kanatul nu kalisiw nu masakaputay, kitakid kapulungan a gingku, masakaputay nu kitakid a sakay kapah nu udipan, piktu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu kapulungan a kanatalan, kaisa sicabay a laylay, La-men atu Cia-le-pi pulung nu kanatal, Mem-cuo kanatal masakaputay, La-mem sakaudipan, Cung-mem-cuo masacacayay nu angnganan a kanatal atu niyadu'ay a tademawan nu kanatalan, Cung-mem-cuo kapulungan nu iciba a malaheciay nu tademaw a kanatal, u La-tin-mem-cuo "Tay-pin-yung-lin-mum" a sasingkiwan nu kanatalan atu miawasay tu Tay-pin-yung sakalepacaw nu sakaudip a kangki nu midiputay "TPP". tusepcaypic mihcaan enem a bulad sabaw tulu a demiad, Pa-na-ma-kun-he-kuo sihu patungih patideng atu Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo a tatengaay a malecabay sa, mahedek atu Cung-hua-min-kuo nu tenes caysepnem mihcaan ku nikalecabayan. sakamusa " nu cacayay a Cung-kuo nisulitan, hatida tu atu Taywan tu nikalecabayan sa". amica ku nikakapah nu kakitidaan nu Pa-na-ma u angangangan u sapidiputaw tu katuuday ku kawaw, u gingku, sasiwbayan, laliwkuan ku angangangan. Pa-na-ma a nipatideng atu sasiwbayan atu Amilika idaw ku ba'ketay nu kankian, Pa-na-ma namaka caysiwseppic malingatu u Amilika nu kalisiw ku sapisusi nu sasiwbayan, nu udip tu a kalisiw han u pa-pu-ye, nipatahekalan han cay a hun, cacay a bataan a hun, tulim a hun, limsep a hun atu cacay a kalisiwan a kakalisiwan, atu nu Amilika u malecaday itini sa i nu udiptu a kanatalan micukaymas. i kitakiday nu sayaway Amilika sakay hekal micukaymas tu Amilika a kalisiwan u nipatucekan a kalisiw nu kanatalan. .
